film.title: Rajdhani Express
film.overview: An eclectic group of passengers travelling from Delhi to Mumbai aboard the Rajdhani Express has to deal with an unexpected situation.

dialogues.dialogue: ooooKkkk. Tlhheeeeyyyn dddoonn'tt eeeevvveeeenn fffeeeeeeeel aaasssslhhaaarmmeeeeddd. :ook. Brother, shame and pride are two sides of the same coin. When they don't have any pride, why will they feel ashamed? Still, what is this? Damn.
